root.title: Proactive AI Chat | Proactive dialogue AI
root.description: Next-gen chat—AI reaches out, remembers your preferences

Home.heroSub: A new kind of AI chat. It checks in, remembers what matters, and starts conversations at the right time—like a thoughtful friend.
Home.sectionFeaturesSub: Rethinking how we talk to machines
Home.sectionStepsSub: Two steps to proactive AI chat
Home.sectionDownloadSub: Run locally and keep full control of your API key
Home.desktopDesc: Windows is available; macOS / Linux coming soon
Home.tuiDesc: For CLI fans • fast and light

proactive.title: Proactive dialogue
proactive.description: The AI doesn’t only reply—it reaches out, checks in, and chats like a real friend.

memory.title: Smart memory
memory.description: Remembers preferences, habits, and what matters. Auto-compressed, efficient, no key detail lost.

local.title: Runs locally
local.description: Data stays on your device. Privacy first—no server; your API key never leaves your machine.

trigger.title: Dual triggers
trigger.description: Time-based and memory-based triggers help the AI start conversations at the right moment.

start.title: Start chatting
start.description: Open chat—the AI will engage with you proactively

customize.title: Configure
customize.description: Add your API key or tune settings

Chat.emptySub: The AI will check in and remember your preferences. Send a message to begin.
